mapper.insert: insert into f_review (id, f_code, fr_subject, fr_star, fr_createdDate, fr_content, c_code) values ( #{id}, #{f_code}, #{fr_subject}, #{fr_star}, sysdate, #{fr_content}, #{c_code})
insert into f_review (id, f_code, fr_subject, fr_star, fr_createdDate, fr_content,fr_idx) values ( #{id}, #{f_code}, #{fr_subject}, #{fr_star}, sysdate, #{fr_content},#{fr_idx})
mapper.select: SELECT id, f_code, c_code, fr_subject, fr_star, fr_content, fr_createddate FROM f_review WHERE c_code = #{c_code}
